title: Allahabad High Court slams husband for alleging his wife, daughters were involved in sex racket
description: The Allahabad High Court has strongly criticised a man for making false and defamatory accusations that his wife and daughters were connected to a sex racket.The Division Bench of JJ Munir and Justice Vinai Kumar Dwivedi said the petition seeking inquiry into the alleged sex racket was essentially about a family dispute. The Court termed it the “most abominable way” of placing a family cause before the Court.“The petitioner xxx, who is the husband of the fourth respondent xxx suffers from the ho
